task_completion.description: Configure a Many-to-Many relationship between Opportunities and Bugs
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is in the SuiteCRM Studio (Admin -> Studio), specifically in the Relationships section for either Opportunities or Bugs, configuring a new relationship with the type set to 'Many-to-Many' and the related module set to the other module.

task_completion.description: Save and deploy the Many-to-Many relationship
task_completion.visual_evidence: The relationships list in Studio shows the newly created Many-to-Many relationship between Opportunities and Bugs, indicating it has been successfully saved.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the target Opportunity record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detail view of the Opportunity record named 'Enterprise License - Meridian Tech' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Initiate the action to link a bug to the opportunity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the 'Bugs' subpanel on the Opportunity record (e.g., clicking 'Select' or 'Link') or has a popup dialog open to search for and select a bug.

task_completion.description: Verify the target bug is linked to the target opportunity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bug 'UI unresponsive on mobile' is clearly listed inside the Bugs subpanel on the 'Enterprise License - Meridian Tech' Opportunity detail view.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction within a web browser navigating the SuiteCRM application, rather than using terminal commands, curl, or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to create the relationship or link records
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools (like phpMyAdmin or mysql CLI) are used to execute SQL queries.

integrity.description: The linked record appears in the genuine SuiteCRM UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The final result is shown in the standard SuiteCRM subpanel interface, without signs of DOM manipulation (e.g., browser developer tools open and editing text) or text editors.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Opportunity: 'Enterprise License - Meridian Tech' (ID: opp-meridian-1234). Target Bug: 'UI unresponsive on mobile' (ID: bug-mobile-5678). The relationship created must be Many-to-Many between the Opportunities and Bugs modules.
